changelog.2.2.0: FEATURE: Added 13-git-commit-author agent, 10-auto-commit workflow, 10-git-awareness rule, 05-commit-semantics foundational skill. Upgraded 02-architectural-design (Hexagonal Architecture) and 03-code-synthesis (Weighted Consensus). Integrated DEPLOY.md into README.md.

FEATURE: Added 09-release-packaging.md rule for automated zip updates. REFACTOR: Updated all internal cross-references to use the new numeric pathing.
changelog.1.5.1: MINOR: Added workflow-orchestration rule. Renamed workflows to use numeric prefixes.
changelog.1.5.0: CRITICAL: Fixed deep-scan .agent/ exclusion bug. Fixed context-memory project-awareness. Added scanner.md workflow. Fixed research-loop exclusion. Added DEPLOY.md.
